{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231942257CA148B7418FCDC1398A"}"},"total":704},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7449394827455005502","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以，好看，就喜欢看这种多开箱的主角的这种外挂，就是我一看这种开箱的内容，我就有种莫名的爽感。整体内容也不枯燥，嗯，而且主角的这个进度啥的也感觉，嗯，我觉得感觉是挺舒服的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734452478,"group_id":"7437401832688716824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6ogzQ2vcy8N3gSKldf1YBFnZDd+rGgJluw+tS3ySohl","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8602f873fb56409086be93f95f163eb1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790000&x-signature=IufqTESeAHzMooL4HPHDfA1kEzo%3D","user_id":"3104630453073496","user_name":"爱吃金瓜汤的夏九幽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3104630453073496","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7437401832688716824","book_info":{"abstract":"【公路多人求生+美女+无系统】
一觉醒来，全球大多数人穿越到公路求生的世界中。
开局每人分配一辆车，其他全靠捡
而他们要做的就是在这公路上寻找生存物资，活下来
赵硕，一名快递员，看着自己的车辆一脸复杂。
“在原来的世界送快递也就算了，来这里自己还要送快递。”
可当车辆天赋解锁的那一刻，赵硕的脸如同灿烂的花。
【快递员（唯一成长型）】：当拥有快递车后，每前进10公里，即可获得1个蓝星快递包裹（0/100）
自此以后
饮料矿泉水随便喝
面板方便面随便吃
甚至连家用电器都有
要多舒服有多舒服
...
“硕哥哥，人家还想吃。”
“硕哥哥，今晚我换这个衣服怎么样。”
“硕弟弟，今晚可以加餐么？”
赵硕把玩着黄金沙鹰笑呵呵的说道：“好好好，全都满足，咱们别的不多就是物资多。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/08fea8e3a5fb80fbe08a137c2cb611c4","author":"白糖小笼包","author_id":"","book_id":"7437401832688716824","book_name":"公路求生：我快递车美女多很合理","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7437402053783077400","read_count":"40673","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2014922"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"970","tags":"游戏体育,穿越,空间,多女主,求生,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9c13708ecf8dfafd5cd6f4bad75ceed9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450145&x-signature=z%2F%2Bhm1mLKHF7D4xX0guHUUO95Mg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"541409981508096","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"97"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231942257CA148B7418FCDC1398A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"for
